---
title: 'Mobile CPU’s Rise to Power: Quantifying the Impact of Generational Mobile
  CPU Design Trends on Performance, Energy, and User Satisfaction'
author:
- Matthew Halpern
- Yuhao Zhu
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/hpca16.pdf
talk_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/hpca16-slides.pdf
journ: HPCA
year: 2016
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 13
---
